TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: idaw kidacacay atademaw musepi, masepinida tayda i sakatus atuksl nu luma' . cumud sa tu sasaay ,maadih nida ku sacacacay a takal, , tepal nu takal idaw namin ku tademaw, itakal matunes nu lami', , nika nayi kumakanayi , alaw han yaabala matina nu mapalaway, , masumad namin patelek sa uciku cay kapiku, , itakalay a kakanen, caykaapi katukuh ilaway,sisa kulebut namin ku bihid. .nika matengil nida ku Suni i pabaw tanutawasa , mabahl cinida maydih tapabaw amiadih.‰ªñÂ•ΩÂ•áÁöÑ‰∏äÊ®ì‰∏ÄÁúã,malecad tu katuud ku tdwmawÂêåÊ®£ÁöÑ‰πüÊúâ‰∏ÄÁæ§‰∫∫, u ciku nu Lima malecad tu cay kalupiku, nika tanunamuh sanamin mukan. .alawhan limanuheni kanahatu capatelek, ,misuayawy tu mahiniay masasuedap ku heni, , masasupadang paalatip, kiyu mukan namin tanunamuh sa .
S.PHON: idaw kida ¶a ¶aj atad…ômaw mus…ôpi, mas…ôpinida tajda i sakatus atuksr~…æ nu r~…æuma î~ ° . ¶umud sa tu sasaaj ,maadiƒß nida ku sa ¶a ¶a ¶aj a takar~…æ, , t…ôpar~…æ nu takar~…æ idaw namin ku tad…ômaw, itakar~…æ matun…ôs nu r~…æami î~ °, , nika naji kumakanaji , ar~…æaw ƒßan jaabar~…æa matina nu mapar~…æawaj, , masumad namin pat…ôr~…æ…ôk sa u ¶iku ¶aj kapiku, , itakar~…æaj a kakan…ôn, ¶ajkaapi katukuƒß ir~…æawaj,sisa kur~…æ…ôbut namin ku biƒßid. .nika mat…ô≈ãir~…æ nida ku suni i pabaw tanutawasa , mabaƒßr~…æ ¶inida majdiƒß tapabaw amiadiƒß.********,mar~…æ…ô ¶ad tu katuud ku tdwmaw********, u ¶iku nu r~…æima mar~…æ…ô ¶ad tu ¶aj kar~…æupiku, nika tanunamuƒß sanamin mukan. .ar~…æawƒßan r~…æimanuƒß…ôni kanaƒßatu ¶apat…ôr~…æ…ôk, ,misuajawj tu maƒßiniaj masasu…ôdap ku ƒß…ôni, , masasupada≈ã paar~…æatip, kiju mukan namin tanunamuƒß sa .
S.FORM: idaw kidacacay atademaw musepi, masepinida tayda i sakatus atuksl nu luma' . cumud sa tu sasaay ,maadih nida ku sacacacay a takal, , tepal nu takal idaw namin ku tademaw, itakal matunes nu lami', , nika nayi kumakanayi , alaw han yaabala matina nu mapalaway, , masumad namin patelek sa uciku cay kapiku, , itakalay a kakanen, caykaapi katukuh ilaway,sisa kulebut namin ku bihid. .nika matengil nida ku Suni i pabaw tanutawasa , mabahl cinida maydih tapabaw amiadih.‰ªñÂ•ΩÂ•áÁöÑ‰∏äÊ®ì‰∏ÄÁúã,malecad tu katuud ku tdwmawÂêåÊ®£ÁöÑ‰πüÊúâ‰∏ÄÁæ§‰∫∫, u ciku nu Lima malecad tu cay kalupiku, nika tanunamuh sanamin mukan. .alawhan limanuheni kanahatu capatelek, ,misuayawy tu mahiniay masasuedap ku heni, , masasupadang paalatip, kiyu mukan namin tanunamuh sa .
